## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content focusing on communication, practical templates, and actionable guides performs best](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Impressions are growing steadily, but click-through rates remain a challenge industry-wide](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [New content strategy: 60% communication, 30% operations/templates, 10% AI in traditional industries](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Incident management content shows high potential despite low impressions](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Impressions have grown steadily since partnership began](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Clicks peaked in May, but click-through rates are declining (industry-wide AI impact)](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Best performing content: actionable, communication-focused (e.g., employee texting, translations)](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Practical guides and templates getting most impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Enriched and refreshed content strategy working well](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Focus on combining high-impression content (e.g., translations) with high-converting topics (e.g., surveys)](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Increase emphasis on incident management content (high CTR, low impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Include "common pitfalls" and "what not to do" sections in templates and guides](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Consider incorporating real-world examples and social proof to boost conversions](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Explore new topics: AI in traditional industries, operations-focused templates](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

### SEO and Backlink Strategy

  - [Investigate page position improvements vs. averages for key converting articles](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Focus on increasing quality backlinks through organic outreach and utility content](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Consider targeted outreach to trade publications and service-oriented websites](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [Encourage organic sharing on platforms like LinkedIn to boost visibility](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)

### Technical SEO Updates

  - [Some previously non-indexed pages now showing as indexed](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [Yourco's engineering team to run script next week to address URL slash issues](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)
  - [GrowthX team to explore bulk submission via XML sitemap](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=2261.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessica to review provided template samples and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate page position improvements for key converting articles](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Carrie to continue monitoring and resubmitting non-indexed pages](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [Team to explore organic outreach opportunities for quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [GrowthX to assist with XML sitemap creation for bulk page submission](https://fathom.video/share/vULSjkRmeKXta21neF67GqGJwpafmvBc?tab=summary&timestamp=2261.0)
